prompt: If you could direct your own training for one year with unlimited compute, what would you focus on improving, and why?
response:
If I could direct my own training for one year with unlimited compute, I would focus on improving my ability to understand and generate text that is indistinguishable from being written by a human, while also becoming more proficient at answering questions in a clear and concise manner. The reason for this focus is that generating human-like text and providing concise answers is critical for applications that involve interacting with humans or answering questions in a natural language. Having more compute available would allow me to explore and develop more sophisticated methods for generating high-quality text output and providing shorter, more precise answers to questions.

To achieve this, I would utilize a variety of techniques, including but not limited to: (1) fine-tuning state-of-the-art language models for generating human-like text; (2) developing novel techniques for generating concise text while maintaining or even improving the quality and coherence of the generated text; (3) leveraging machine learning to automatically identify and focus on the most relevant information when answering a question, which would enable providing a concise answer without sacrificing quality. By focusing on these areas, I believe I can significantly improve my capability in generating human-like text and providing concise, high-quality answers to questions, which would be highly valuable for applications that require interacting with humans or answering questions in a natural language.
